issueDatetime.description: The date and time the PIU was issued.

acquisitionCost.description: The acquisition cost of the PIU. May be absent if no cost was paid.

equityPlanId.description: The identifier of the equity plan under which the PIU was issued. May be absent if not plan-associated.

shareClassId.description: The identifier of the share class associated with the PIU.

vestingScheduleTemplateId.description: The identifier of the vesting schedule template. May be absent if the PIU has no vesting schedule.

issuanceReason.description: The reason the PIU was created. See `PiuIssuanceReason` for all supported values.

precededBySecurityId.description: The identifier of the security that preceded this PIU (e.g. the certificate that was transferred). May be absent if the PIU was issued directly from the share reserve.

schema_def.description: The issuance transaction for a PIU. Represents the initial issuance of the profits interest unit.
